title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud Spanner now offers hybrid search combining full-text and vector search for AI applications. The system integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to enable RAG and contextual search experiences built on operational data.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Google Cloud Spanner, which combines full-text and vector search in a single system for AI applications. It matters because it brings retrieval directly to operational data, supporting RAG and contextual search without moving data to a separate store. The key takeaway is that Spanner's hybrid search integrates with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to enable RAG and contextual search experiences built on operational data.
